name: Danablu Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large 3-quart saucepan, melt butter and blend in flour.
2. Remove from heat and stir in boiling water, a little at a time, until smooth.
3. Bring to a rolling boil. Add bouillon cubes and stir to dissolve.
4. Add crumbled Danish Blue Cheese, stirring as cheese is added to dissolve.
5. Return to boiling and boil 10 minutes to develop flavor.
6. Reduce heat and add the half and half, stirring constantly.
7. Heat just to boiling and serve hot, adding a spoonful of topping to each serving.
